And his God will be with him, and he will go up to Ierousalem, which is in Judea, and let him build the house of Israel’s God; he is the God who is in Ierousalem. 4 And every one left shall go from all the places where he resides there, and men of his place shall receive them with silver and gold and with goods and animals, besides freewill offering for the house of the God who is Ierousalem.” 5 And the chiefs of the paternal families Iouda and Beniamin and the priests and Leuites got up, all of whom God had stirred their spirit, to go up to build the Lord’s house, which is in Ierousalem. 6 And all from round about prevailed with their hands with vessels of silver, with gold and with goods and with livestock and with presents, besides the things that were freely offered. 7 And King Cyrus brought out the vessels of the house of the Lord, which Nabouchodonosor took from Ierousalem and placed them in house of his god. 8 And Cyrus, king of the Persians, brought them out onto the hand of Mithridates Garbarenos b, and he counted them for Sasabassar, the ruler of Iouda. 9 And this was their number: gold wine coolers, thirty, and silver wine coolers, one thousand, assorted items, twenty-nine, 10 gold chephoure c, thirty, and silver ones and other vessels, one thousand, 11 All the vessels in gold and ver: five thousand four hundred, every one which went up with Sasabassar from the exile of Babylon to Ierousalem.
